summary: Made small seam edits at the chapter edges to keep Chapter 16's entry and exit distinct from adjacent material while preserving the scene's core revelations, and replaced one calibration-only style-bible line that had appeared verbatim.
edits: Shifted the opening to Damian-first urgency instead of a time-first lead so it does not echo Chapter 17's temporal opening scaffold.
Replaced Damian's standalone use of Anya's name because it matched a calibration-only example line from the style bible.
Re-anchored the final transition on the city's returning thought-noise rather than another cold-outside beat, keeping the handoff distinct from Chapter 15's ending.
